title: Geepas Portable Smoothie Maker - 420ML Personal Blender with Rechargeable USB Type-C and 6 Blades, Fruit Mixer Juicer Mini Portable Blender Cup for Travel, Kitchen, Gym, Office, Pink
features: ✅ BUILT-IN RECHARGEABLE BATTERY -Our portable blender is USB rechargeable and comes with a built-in 1500mAh*2 rechargeable Lithium battery that can be charged via power bank, AC adapter or computer in 4-5 hours; your portable blender can be used for 10-13 minutes on a full charge.

✅ 6 POWERFUL STAINLESS STEEL BLADES - Our portable smoothie blender has 6 blades made of 304 stainless steel, blender for shakes and smoothies effortlessly crushes fruits, vegetables. Make your favorite healthy drinks and shakes anytime, anywhere.

✅ VERSATILE & PORTABLE SMOOTHIE BLENDER - Travel nutrition blender can be used to make nutritious single-serve smoothies, salad dressings, blended juices, mixed fruits and vegetables, coffee, protein shakes, baby food or formula; not only can you blend, but you can also drink straight from the blender bottles, super portable mini Juicer is ideal for the kitchen, office, travel, camping, fishing, and outdoor activities.

✅ POWERFUL SMOOTHIE BLENDER: 150 Watts powerful motor, 6 stainless steel ultra-sharp blades, quickly blends fruits and vegetables, leave no chunks of fruit, easy to go. Ideal personal blender for making healthy and delicious smoothie shakes.

✅ MULTI-FUNCTION, MINI BLENDER ON THE GO: One small machine can meet your various daily needs: smoothies, juice blends, mix fruits and vegetables, protein shake, baby supplementary food. You can drink nutritious juice, shakes or smoothies anywhere you want, such as home, office, gym, travel or any other outdoor activities.
description: Product Description 420 ML CAPACITY Suitable for individual servings, 420ml capacity available. CONVENIENT FOR TRAVEL Mini Juicer is ideal for the kitchen, office, travel, camping, fishing, and outdoor activities. BLEND SATISFYING SMOOTHIES Make your favorite healthy drinks and shakes anytime, anywhere. RECHARGEABLE BATTERY With a built-in 1500mAh*2 rechargeable Lithium battery that can be charged via power bank, AC adapter or computer in 4-5 hours. STAINLESS STEEL BLADES Our portable smoothie blender has 6 blades made of 304 stainless steel. ONE BUTTON OPERATION Making it exceptionally easy and convenient to use.
